content:
i spent a lot of time with e0 corpo and i honestly thought she was fine as a unit
she mostly crushed act 1 (though a lot of it was saya carried) but i mostly saw her as a DPS
with oe i feel like, despite doing more damage
her support identity has really been unlocked
Ominous Semaphore also grants a surprisingly high amount of Aliemus in one go, on top of the Weakness Application if you have her E2

semaphore is 30 aliemus
and the strikes and defense do 15 baseline at e1, with them being 25 if you discard each twice
it gets even better with horla wheel
god, i want it so bad
i want a better wheel for her, and a better covenant
but you need acc level 58 for dream of medicine..
Premium Covenant needs a Premium Unlock Method ig lmao
Yeah, not all too bad at alk
by the way somewhat unrelated but
do you have any thoughts on the pontos version?

my interpretive consensus is
she's really good for him
not necessarily the other way around
i think corpo makes pontos better but pontos makes corpo worse
then i suppose it's about the ceiling of the team
if pontos' team has higher ceiling than other corpo teams, then corpo would be better suited to support him?
but i dont know what his ceiling is
i keep hearing that he's bugged in all sorts of ways too
i personally think hes on par with doresain for the worst arc 2 unit
what's so bad about him in your eyes?
my biggest issue with him is that he doesnt replace murphy, but aurita
yea he seems to be decidedly
but he doesnt bring his own discard to the table
so the whole team plays slower
He likes corpo but she doesn't like him
he benefits from discard but doesnt provide discard
aurita version, everyone benefits from discard

i think hes a bad warden and very slow, so to enable him you need to spend a lot of time in mobwaves and hes super resource hungry in bosses too, so you end up playing a worse version of discard with casiah while you could just be playing a faster less scaling focussed version of discard which also makes it so you need to tank less damage
so he makes a niche for himself by being worse
and then struggles to fill it
hes mostly an exalt dps yeah?
hes great at charging the team/creating insights
but his str down is lackluster to me

i mean if you want insights...
arc 2 casiah is great at it
and you get to keep aurita
lowkey the best thing about casiah is being able to setup ultra turn so you can first turn rouse corpo and aurita lmdao

Btw guys, thoughts on this Team? I'm considering on picking up Aurita +3 this Month and then raising it further in the following

Would it be a great idea to replace Leigh for her? Kind've just put her there, since I didn't have much other choices
Oh so your Corpo clear this rotation is just using him as a DAqueor enabler and fat Con <:Clem_question:1513280243459166380>

yeah basically, hes also decent vs gmurphy since his str down lowers her only meaningful attack which is her ult even if its less effective it still enables it quite well (also all my other aequor units are highly contested so 🤡)

are you using murphy elsewhere?
i get the idea behind leigh here since she has decent str stacking and good embryo income but
generally i feel as if the team is pretty aliemus self sufficient with the aurita version
Yeah, I gave Murphy to Vortice along with Thais & Celeste
the team also has no meaningful devour effects on exalt

the main thing murphy is used for is 
a. vortex reversal is just really good
b. she lets you live, because you need to ramp
there are several conditions the corpo discard team needs to fulfill to be at max strength:
- corpo herself wants 10 tentacles to max out her E2 pilot scaling, and thats when you start getting the really juiced aftershocks from them
- aurita wants her exalt to consume 10 glands, which does take a bit to get into the deck

- lightning retribution is expensive unless you discard it a few times, this can be done quickly sometimes but a lot of the time it's better to keep it in hand and lower its cost slowly until you burst with red stance
basically if you want to do the good damage
more experienced players can correct me on any of this btw
im pretty new myself so my advice isnt rock solid
this is just my observations after many hours of playing it
Not only buys time but scales alongside it
Yeah, I'd say that you were right
Most of what you had said is part of what I had taken into consideration, giving Vortice Murphy
unironically vortex reversal ends up hitting very hard by the end
and her 0 cost stacks tentacle damage as you discard it
right so, here's where the teambuilding question comes in
If you have Saya corrosion, you don't need that much time.
is leigh a decent enough stall alternative in this context?
this is true, I've bursted super fast with saya before
but once the content reaches like
idk ive just needed to stall for longer
maybe this is me and my account being new tho
I use pontos on this team for survival and to raise tent damage

certain stages let you borrow units from other players
if you'd like to complete this, go to Interlude and do the resource stages with borrowed supports
always be on the lookout on whether it's available
it lets you beat much harder stages than what your account can currently handle
such as max level event resource stages
you can get a good lineup of supports to borrow reliably
and scrolling through the top players' profiles until you find a unit you'd like to borrow
once you've done that, you can just
How to take a whale support unit even if they don't add you as a friend:
Could alternatively ask around if you can borrow somebody else's Characters and add eachother as Mutuals
And if there's one in particular that you want to use, you could also ask around if anybody has it

other people saying to use a crit set and use sorel wheel cuz of the cdmg stacking on multihits or 24 wheel for the exalt dmg

her base cards could do pretty well

Could be troll, but this is what I've been using on her

Covenants 
- Crimson Pulse
Crit Rate 1, 2, 3
Damage Amp 5, 6
Realm Mastery 4

- target Crit Rate / Damage, Damage Amplication and Death Resistance

WoDs 
- Rewinding Time
- Path Forsaken

if you're running her with corpo

and exalting more often on her is quite good

General rule of thumb is this.

If the unit base stats are low... They benefit from STR (multihitter especially)

If they got high base stats, they benefit more from DMG amp base boost and etc
